name: Technical Demonstration Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Develop non-production demonstrators → Systemic: Prove fallback-authentication feasibility (30% reduction in platform-dependency risk) → Strategic: Create technical evidence for procurement mandates. Controls Technical Risk vs. Operational Speed. Weakness: The options fail to consider hardware-token interoperability with legacy systems.
options: Leverage FIDO2/WebAuthn on GrapheneOS with minimal API changes
Integrate hardware tokens via OpenID Connect with modular trust layers
Deploy blockchain-based identity attestation for decentralized verification
review: Controls Technical Risk vs. Operational Speed. Weakness: The options fail to consider hardware-token interoperability with legacy systems.
